logistics.lodging_strategy: Official partner Marival Resorts offers 35% discount with code SPIN2WIN at Marival Emotions Resort & Suites (host hotel) or Marival Distinct Luxury Residences.[1]

final_verdict.one_liner: Premium beachside gran fondo blending epic coastal rides with Mexican festival vibes.

youtube_data.search_query: GranFondo Riviera Nayarit gran fondo cycling Riviera Nayarit

videos.title: From Sand To Sun - GranFondo Riviera Nayarit 2025
videos.description:
Granfondo Riviera Nayarit is an unforgettable cycling experience along Mexico’s stunning Pacific coastline, blending world-class riding with vibrant local culture.

From the golden beaches to the lush Sierra Madre mountains, riders of all levels came together for an epic day on two wheels.

📍 Explore the route, the community, and the energy that made this year’s edition one to remember.

Open to all – join us for the next adventure: https://www.rbcgranfondo.com/event/nayarit

videos.title: 🏝🛣𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻 𝗙𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗼 𝗪𝗵𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗹𝗲𝗿 - 𝗥𝗶𝘃𝗶𝗲𝗿𝗮 𝗡𝗮𝘆𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘁 🚲🏁
videos.description:
𝗘𝗹 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗙𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗼 𝗪𝗵𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗹𝗲𝗿, 𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗲𝗯𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗼 𝗱𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲 𝟭𝟱 𝗮𝗻̃𝗼𝘀 𝗲𝗻 𝗖𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗱𝗮́, 𝗲𝘀 𝘂𝗻𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗹𝗼𝘀 𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗼𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗰𝗶𝗰𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗿𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗮 𝗺𝗮́𝘀 𝗶𝗺𝗽𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗔𝗺𝗲́𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗮 𝗱𝗲𝗹 𝗡𝗼𝗿𝘁𝗲, 𝗿𝗲𝘂𝗻𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗼 𝗮 𝗺𝗮́𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝟱,𝟬𝟬𝟬 𝗰𝗶𝗰𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝘀 𝗰𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗮𝗻̃𝗼.

𝗣𝗼𝗿 𝗽𝗿𝗶𝗺𝗲𝗿𝗮 𝘃𝗲𝘇, 𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗴𝗮 𝗮 𝗠𝗲́𝘅𝗶𝗰𝗼 𝗮𝗹 𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗮𝗰𝘂𝗹𝗮𝗿 𝗱𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗻𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗕𝗮𝗵𝗶́𝗮 𝗱𝗲 𝗕𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗮𝘀, 𝗼𝗳𝗿𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗼 𝘂𝗻𝗮 𝗿𝘂𝘁𝗮 𝗱𝗲 𝗰𝗶𝗰𝗹𝗶𝘀𝗺𝗼 𝗱𝗲 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗿𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗮 𝗱𝗲 𝟭𝟬𝟬 𝗸𝗺 𝘆 𝗲𝘀𝗽𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗼 𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗲𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗰𝗶𝗰𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝘀.

videos.title: Gran Fondo Riviera Nayarit Course Preview
videos.description: Join us on April 24, 2016 for an aventure that will always be remembered. Whether you decide to race, ride a personal best or just enjoy the day, the Riviera Nayarit Grand Fondo will be an event that you will never forget!  Our Gran Fondo will take you from La Cruz de Huanacaxtle to Sayulita and back. Over the course of three laps and over 165 km, you will be tested with a total of NINE short but challenging climbs - a total elevation gain of over 1800 meters! In addition, an 8 km section along the coastal road to La Cruz will push the peloton to the limit. If you are coming to race this event - be prepared - at this will be a very tough and competitive race. We expect that the many local and international top athletes that will be in attendance will be setting a blistering pace on the climbs, the flats and the coastal rollers. Come see why Bucerias and the Riviera Nayarit region has been growing rapidly in popularity amongst Mexican, American and Canadian cyclists alike.
videos.curation_reason: Course preview with specific details about the challenging route including nine climbs and 1800 meters of elevation gain.

videos.title: GRAN FONDO RIVIERA NAYARIT 2025
videos.description:
𝗣𝗥𝗘𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗔𝗧𝗘 𝗣𝗢𝗥 𝗘𝗟 𝗖𝗜𝗘𝗥𝗥𝗘 𝗗𝗘 𝗟𝗔 𝗖𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗘𝗧𝗘𝗥𝗔 𝗙𝗘𝗗𝗘𝗥𝗔𝗟 𝟮𝟬𝟬

𝗘𝘀𝘁𝗼 𝗽𝗼𝗿 𝗹𝗮 𝗽𝗿𝗼́𝘅𝗶𝗺𝗮 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗿𝗲𝗿𝗮 𝗰𝗶𝗰𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮 𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝘀𝗲 𝗹𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗮𝗿𝗮́  𝗮𝗰𝗮𝗯𝗼 𝗲𝗹 𝟱 𝗱𝗲 𝗮𝗯𝗿𝗶𝗹 𝗱𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗲 𝘀𝗲𝗿𝗮́ 𝗼𝗰𝘂𝗽𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗽𝗼𝗿 𝗹𝗼𝘀 𝗰𝗶𝗰𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗮𝘀 𝘁𝗲𝗻𝗶𝗲𝗻𝗱𝗼 𝗰𝗼𝗺𝗼 𝗿𝘂𝘁𝗮 𝗼𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗹𝗮 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗴𝗲𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗮𝗱𝗮 𝗰𝗮𝗿𝗿𝗲𝘁𝗲𝗿𝗮.
